use_cases: Interactive decorative background for landing pages
Playful mood indicator or feedback component
Fun visual element for entertainment or media applications
Animated background grid for creative portfolios
ai_summary: An animated smiley face component that generates a responsive grid of morphing emojis across the viewport. Uses GSAP's MorphSVGPlugin for smooth shape transformations and applies radial gradient color changes on hover, transitioning from neutral yellow tones to expressive red and orange colors. The component dynamically recalculates the grid on window resize for responsive behavior.
